backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the incident management backend with CRUD operations: create incidents, add updates, change status, delete resolved incidents, and query all incidents stored in a persistent map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the search/filter bar feature (REQ-1) to its implementation file Dashboard.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference for the project's frontend architecture and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light (`:root`) and dark (`.dark`) themes covering background, foreground, card, border, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'District Status Page' that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, and TanStack Router with two routes: public Dashboard (/) and AdminPanel (/admin), both wrapped in a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/AddUpdateForm.ts: Form component for appending a timestamped update message to a selected incident, using React Hook Form and the `useAddUpdate` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ChangeStatusForm: Form component for changing an incident's status via incident and status dropdowns, displaying the current status for context before submitting via the `useChangeStatus` mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/CreateIncidentFo: A React form component for creating new incidents, using react-hook-form for validation, checking ID uniqueness before submission, and accepting fields for ID, title, description, affected service, and severity.
frontend/src/components/IncidentCard.tsx: A collapsible card component that displays incident details including severity, status, affected service, timestamps, description, and a sorted list of updates.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component providing a sticky header with navigation links, theme toggle, logout button, and a footer wrapping child content.
frontend/src/components/SeverityBadge.ts: A badge component that renders a color-coded, labeled badge with an animated dot indicator for incident severity levels (critical, major, minor, informational).
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: A badge component that renders a color-coded label for incident status values (investigating, identified, monitoring, resolved).
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A small button component that toggles between dark and light themes using the useTheme hook, displaying a sun or moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all incident CRUD operations (fetch all, fetch one, create, add update, change status, delete, check ID uniqueness) using a backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Wraps next-themes to expose the current resolved theme, a dark-mode boolean, and a toggle function.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, and declaring OKLCH CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including status and severity colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin page gated behind Internet Identity login, providing tabbed forms to create incidents, add updates, change status, and delete resolved incidents.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Public dashboard page that fetches all incidents and renders them with real-time keyword, severity, and status filter controls, split into active and resolved sections.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based color tokens, custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, accordion animations, and registering typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking the 'District Status Page' project version, existing features, and a pending feature request for a search/filter option.
